title: Lafarge Africa Divest 35% Stake In Continental Blue Investment Ghana
description: Following its board of directors meeting on Wednesday, Lafarge Africa Plc has announced the decision to divest its 35% shareholding stake in Continental Blue Investment Ghana Limited (CBI Ghana).
html: Following its board of directors meeting on Wednesday, Lafarge Africa Plc has announced the decision to divest its 35% shareholding stake in Continental Blue Investment Ghana Limited (CBI Ghana).
